description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI build check that runs on every push to main and dev branches, on pull requests to these branches, and on a scheduled cron job at 2 AM UTC. Use an ubuntu-latest job with a 30-minute timeout to build .NET 7 sources, run unit tests and integration tests with code coverage, and publish coverage reports to Coveralls and Codecov. Also, send a Discord notification on failure when the workflow runs on a schedule.
